items.check_zh: 存在 skill_design_record，且触发、边界、协议、资源和风险完整。
items.check_en: A skill design record exists and covers trigger, boundaries, protocol, resources, and risk.

items.check_zh: 入口和图谱节点保持短文本，长内容通过 id/path 外链。
items.check_en: Entrypoints and graph nodes stay short; long content is linked by id/path.

items.check_zh: 至少有正例、反例、边界例和邻近误触发例。
items.check_en: Includes happy, negative, boundary, and adjacent false-trigger cases.

items.check_zh: 至少一个验收信号是确定性检查。
items.check_en: At least one acceptance signal is deterministic.

items.check_zh: 关键流程有轨迹断言或 trace 证据。
items.check_en: Critical workflows have trajectory assertions or trace evidence.

items.check_zh: 存在 with-skill / without-skill 或 old/new 配对评估。
items.check_en: A paired with-skill / without-skill or old/new evaluation exists.

items.check_zh: 记录成功率、触发准确率、稳定性、成本、上下文长度和控制指标。
items.check_en: Records success, activation, reliability, cost, context length, and control metrics.

items.check_zh: 失败样例已进入回归套件。
items.check_en: Failure cases are added to the regression suite.
